description_long: This nightstand is a compact, rectangular piece of furniture crafted from dark wood with a subtle, linear grain pattern. The front features two spacious drawers, each equipped with a recessed handle that blends seamlessly into the design. The nightstand stands on four elegantly curved wooden legs, providing both stability and a touch of classic style. The sides and back are plain, with no additional ornamentation or hardware visible. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for supporting lamps, books, or other small items. Its overall appearance is functional and understated, making it suitable for both modern and traditional urban interiors.
description: A dark wood nightstand with two recessed-handle drawers and curved legs, featuring a flat, sturdy top and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain, unadorned wooden surface and two visible legs.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two drawers with recessed handles and all four curved legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with a plain wooden surface and two legs visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a featureless wooden back and all four legs.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
